calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Tom Huster, Esq. for Plaintiff: Judy L. Cheong, also present.
Richard Idell, Esq. for Defendant: Fresh Start Hospitality, present by Brian Fung.
Parties reached a settlement by stipulation.
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal with prejudice.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant will make 3 payments to Plaintiff as follows: $23,010.00 by 5 P.M. of 05-02-07, $13,300.00 by 5 P.M. of 05-05-07 and $23,010.00 by 5 P.M. of 05-14-07.
Payment shall be made by certified check to Mr. Huster's office.
If Defendant failed, notice will be made to Defendant's counsel as a three business day to cured the default.
Plaintiff will apply for an Ex Parte Motion for entry of judgment, upon the 5th business day following the due date, for possession of the property, forfeiture of the lease agreement, no further stay. Defendant waived rights to appeal.
Judgment for Back-rent $13,100.00, Per Diem Damages $39,900.00 Attorney's Fees in total of $4,500.00, Costs $435.00 and Late Fees $1,985.00
Parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Failure To Post Jury Fees

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED, APR-25-2007: F. THOMAS HUSTER, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; RICHARD J. IDELL, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY A REPRESENTATIVE FOR DEFENDANT THIS DAY; THE MATTER IS ORDERED TAKEN OFF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR IN D-218; TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-218).
